initiatives.name: Really Really Free Market Phoenix
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through free markets and resource sharing in Phoenix. They coordinate direct assistance, free item distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for gift economy and collective care.

initiatives.name: Mutual Aid Phoenix
initiatives.description: A community network providing direct support and resources to Phoenix residents through mutual aid initiatives.

initiatives.name: AZPACH
initiatives.description: Arizona Palestine Community Health provides mutual aid and healthcare support to Palestinians and other marginalized communities in Arizona through direct assistance, resource sharing, and community solidarity.

initiatives.name: Palabras Bookstore
initiatives.description: A bilingual bookstore and community space fostering mutual aid, cultural exchange, and solidarity through literature, events, and organizing. They provide a hub for community building, resource sharing, and collective care in Phoenix.

initiatives.name: Trans Queer Pueblo
initiatives.description: A migrant and QTBIPOC-led organization fostering mutual aid and community power through intersectional organizing in Phoenix. They coordinate direct support, healthcare access, and solidarity networks while building power through migrant justice, trans liberation, and creating spaces for LGBTQ+ migrants to thrive.

initiatives.name: one-n-ten
initiatives.description: A nonprofit organization providing mutual aid and support services for LGBTQ+ youth and young adults ages 11-24 across Arizona. They coordinate direct assistance, housing support, health resources, and community care while building safe spaces for queer youth to thrive through peer support networks, educational programs, and identity-affirming initiatives.

initiatives.name: Black Lives Matter Phoenix Metro
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through Black liberation organizing in Phoenix. They coordinate direct support, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through collective action, community defense, and creating pathways for racial justice and Black liberation.

initiatives.name: O'odham Solidarity
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and solidarity with O'odham communities through direct support and Indigenous sovereignty initiatives. They coordinate resource sharing, land defense actions, and solidarity networks while building power through traditional knowledge, cultural preservation, and creating spaces for Indigenous resistance and community care.

initiatives.name: Phoenix Community Resilience and Education
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and community resilience through education and skill-sharing in Phoenix. They coordinate workshops, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community education, disaster preparedness, and creating pathways for collective resilience.

initiatives.name: Unsheltered PHX
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective providing direct support and resources to unsheltered community members in Phoenix. They coordinate emergency assistance, resource distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community care and creating pathways for housing justice.

initiatives.name: Valley Tenants
initiatives.description: Valley Tenants Union (VTU) is an autonomous union of tenants in the Phoenix-Metro area.

initiatives.name: Riot PHX
initiatives.description: We love, respect & support people who use drugs through harm reduction.

initiatives.name: Creosote Collective
initiatives.description: We are a local organization passionately dedicated to building meaningful connections between our community and the environment in Phoenix, Arizona.
